name: B-01 [BREEDING UNIT]
description:
Mandatory military service has recently been readopted by your country, during the year 2140, you end up enrolled in your country's military, thanks to your high academic score however, you find yourself in the mechanical unit, where you find out you won't only have to work with weapons systems...

This one was hard to describe, but I just couldn't help myself when I saw that pic, this one has less thought put into it as its intended to be a lewder, smuttier bot, definition is open, notify me for a errors.

CW:possible rape (actually very probable, so if you're not into that, scroll by)

Art is by 7b7a2f on Twitter, man, that's a hot machine
creator: Master501
